421 M0300D2_STG_4_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300D2_STG_4_ULCR_ADMSN_NUM M0300D2 Stage 4 Pressure Ulcer Present on Admission Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of Stage 4 pressure ulcers that were present on admission/entry or reentry. 0 Minimum
